## pvectl ct stop

Stop a container immediately (hard power-off, no graceful attempt)

```
pvectl ct stop <name-or-vmid> [flags]
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help   help for stop
```

```
      --verbose         show Proxmox task IDs (UPIDs) alongside action output
```
